title: Optimism Retro Funding (RPGF)
description: Retroactive public goods funding. Projects are nominated and badgeholders vote on allocations. Rounds distribute $10M-$30M+.

title: Arbitrum DAO Grants
description: Multiple tracks: Foundation grants, DAO proposals, domain-specific programs. $3B+ DAO treasury. Focus on DeFi, gaming, security, tooling.

title: Base Builder Grants
description: Rolling grants for consumer apps, DeFi, onchain social, developer tooling on Base (Coinbase L2).

title: Solana Foundation Grants
description: Rolling grants for DeFi, payments, DePIN, gaming, mobile, developer tooling, and security on Solana.

title: Uniswap Foundation Grants
description: Grants for DeFi research, MEV mitigation, Uniswap v4 hooks, security, and governance research. $74M+ treasury.

title: LayerZero Bug Bounty
description: Cross-chain messaging protocol. Highest bounty on Immunefi. Requires PoC and KYC for payout.

title: Sky (MakerDAO) Bug Bounty
description: DeFi lending/stablecoin protocol (formerly MakerDAO). 10% of funds at risk, capped at max.

title: Wormhole Bug Bounty
description: Cross-chain bridge protocol bug bounty.

title: Optimism Bug Bounty
description: L2 rollup bug bounty. Min $75,000 for critical. 10% of economic damage.

title: Alliance DAO Accelerator
description: 12-week crypto-native accelerator. 2-3 cohorts per year. Highly competitive. For DeFi, infrastructure, consumer, gaming startups.

title: Outlier Ventures Base Camp
description: 12-week accelerator with chain-specific tracks (Sui, NEAR, Aptos, etc.). Focus on AI x Web3, DeFi, DePIN.
